mapper.select: select P.post_no , P.post_title , P.post_content , P.post_created_date , P.post_updated_date , P.post_view_count , P.post_upvote_count , P.post_is_spoiler , NVL(C.comment_count, 0) as commentCount , U.user_nickname as user_nickname , HC.cat_id as header_cat_id , HC.cat_name as header_cat_name , BC.cat_id as board_cat_id , BC.cat_name as board_cat_name from movmov_community_posts P left join (select post_no, count(*) as comment_count from movmov_community_comments group by post_no) C on P.post_no = C.post_no join movmov_content_categories HC on P.post_header = HC.cat_id join movmov_content_categories BC on P.post_board_type = BC.cat_id join movmov_users U on P.user_id = U.user_id where P.post_no = #{postNo}

select P.post_no , P.post_title , P.post_content , P.post_created_date , P.post_updated_date , P.post_view_count , P.post_upvote_count , P.post_is_spoiler , NVL(C.comment_count, 0) as commentCount , U.user_nickname as user_nickname , HC.cat_id as header_cat_id , HC.cat_name as header_cat_name , BC.cat_id as board_cat_id , BC.cat_name as board_cat_name from movmov_community_posts P left join (select post_no, count(*) as comment_count from movmov_community_comments group by post_no) C on P.post_no = C.post_no join movmov_content_categories HC on P.post_header = HC.cat_id join movmov_content_categories BC on P.post_board_type = BC.cat_id join movmov_users U on P.user_id = U.user_id where P.post_board_type = #{boardId} and P.post_is_deleted = 'N' order by P.post_no desc
